subcodes.first_line: Sanctified praise, beyond the grasp of minds and intellects, befitteth that Most Desired Lord Who, through His all-compelling Will, hath fashioned the world [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مقدس از ادراک و عقول حضرت مقصودیرا لایق و سزاست که باراده مهیمنه خود عالم
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @justice and wrath of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @love of God
